sentences.target: Der Durchschnitt liegt bei zwölf Grad.

translations.de: Der Durchschnitt liegt bei zwölf Grad.
translations.en: The average is around twelve degrees.
translations.es: La temperatura media es de unos doce grados.
translations.fr: La température moyenne est d'environ douze degrés.
translations.it: La temperatura media è di circa dodici gradi.
translations.pt: A temperatura média é de cerca de doze graus.
translations.tr: Ortalama sıcaklık yaklaşık on iki derece.
translations.vi: Nhiệt độ trung bình khoảng mười hai độ.
translations.ar: متوسط الحرارة حوالي اثنتי عشرة درجة.
translations.nl: Gemiddeld is het rond de twaalf graden.
translations.hi: औसतन तापमान करीब बारह डिग्री है.
translations.pl: Średnia temperatura to około dwanaście stopni.
translations.el: Η μέση θερμοκρασία είναι γύρω στους δώδεκα βαθμούς.
translations.nb: I snitt er det rundt tolv grader.
translations.id: Suhu rata-rata sekitar dua belas derajat.
translations.sv: I snitt är det runt tolv grader.
translations.ro: Temperatura medie este de aproximativ douăsprezece grade.
translations.cs: Průměrná teplota je kolem dvanácti stupňů.
translations.da: I gennemsnit er det omkring tolv grader.

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative masculine singular; determiner of 'Durchschnitt' (subject).
Common noun; nominative singular; head of the subject NP.
Main verb (3rd person singular present); used with 'bei' to indicate a value/level.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a PP expressing the value/level.
Cardinal numeral; modifies 'Grad' to indicate quantity.
Common noun; object of 'bei' (dative); measurement unit.

sentences.target: Im Durchschnitt brauche ich zwanzig Minuten.

translations.de: Im Durchschnitt brauche ich zwanzig Minuten.
translations.en: On average, I need twenty minutes.
translations.fr: En moyenne, il me faut vingt minutes.
translations.it: In media mi servono venti minuti.
translations.ru: В среднем мне нужно двадцать минут.
translations.pt: Em média, eu levo vinte minutos.
translations.he: בממוצע זה לוקח לי עשרים דקות.
translations.vi: Trung bình tôi mất hai mươi phút.
translations.nl: Gemiddeld doe ik er twintig minuten over.
translations.uk: У середньому мені потрібно двадцять хвилин.
translations.hi: औसतन मुझे बीस मिनट लगते हैं.
translations.pl: Średnio zajmuje mi to dwadzieścia minut.
translations.el: Κατά μέσο όρο μου παίρνει είκοσι λεπτά.
translations.nb: I snitt bruker jeg tjue minutter.
translations.id: Rata-rata saya butuh dua puluh menit.
translations.sv: I snitt tar det tjugo minuter för mig.
translations.ro: În medie îmi ia douăzeci de minute.
translations.cs: V průměru mi to trvá dvacet minut.
translations.da: I gennemsnit tager det mig tyve minutter.
translations.fi: Keskimäärin siihen menee minulta kaksikymmentä minuuttia.
translations.ja: 平均して20分かかります。

tokens.explanation: Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition introducing a dative PP ('im Durchschnitt' = 'on average').
Common noun; object of 'im' (dative); part of the idiomatic PP.
Main verb (1st person singular present); takes an accusative object expressing required time.
Personal pronoun; first person singular; nominative subject.
Cardinal numeral; modifies 'Minuten' to indicate quantity.
Common noun; accusative plural; direct object denoting duration.

sentences.target: Unser Team ist im Durchschnitt gut.

translations.de: Unser Team ist im Durchschnitt gut.
translations.en: Our team is good on average.
translations.es: En general, nuestro equipo es bueno.
translations.fr: Dans l'ensemble, notre équipe est bonne.
translations.it: Nel complesso la nostra squadra è buona.
translations.zh-Hans: 总体来说我们队还不错。
translations.pt: No geral, nossa equipe é boa.
translations.vi: Nhìn chung đội của chúng tôi khá tốt.
translations.nl: Over het algemeen is ons team goed.
translations.hi: कुल मिलाकर हमारी टीम अच्छी है.
translations.pl: Ogólnie rzecz biorąc, nasza drużyna jest dobra.
translations.el: Γενικά η ομάδα μας είναι καλή.
translations.nb: Alt i alt er laget vårt bra.
translations.ro: Per ansamblu, echipa noastră e bună.
translations.da: Overordnet set er vores hold godt.
translations.ja: 全体的にうちのチームはいいです。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; agrees with 'Team'; nominative; marks possession.
Common noun; neuter; nominative subject.
Copular auxiliary (3rd person singular present); links the subject to the predicate 'gut'.
Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition introducing a dative PP functioning as an adverbial ('on average').
Common noun; object of 'im' (dative).
Adjective; predicate complement with the copula.

sentences.target: Mein Gehalt liegt unter dem Durchschnitt.

translations.de: Mein Gehalt liegt unter dem Durchschnitt.
translations.en: My salary is below the average.
translations.es: Mi salario está por debajo de la media.
translations.fr: Mon salaire est en dessous de la moyenne.
translations.it: Il mio stipendio è sotto la media.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的工资低于平均水平。
translations.pt: Meu salário está abaixo da média.
translations.vi: Lương của tôi thấp hơn mức trung bình.
translations.nl: Mijn salaris ligt onder het gemiddelde.
translations.hu: A fizetésem az átlag alatt van.
translations.hi: मेरी तनख्वाह औसत से कम है.
translations.el: Ο μισθός μου είναι κάτω από τον μέσο όρο.
translations.ja: 私の給料は平均より低いです。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; agrees with 'Gehalt'; nominative; marks possession.
Common noun; neuter; nominative subject.
Main verb (3rd person singular present); used with 'unter' to denote being below a reference.
Preposition governing dative in static context; introduces the PP 'unter dem Durchschnitt'.
Definite article; dative singular; determiner of 'Durchschnitt'.
Common noun; object of 'unter' (dative); reference level.
